name: Cecil B. DeMille
description: American film director, producer and actor (1881–1959)
abstract: Cecil Blount DeMille (; August 12, 1881 – January 21, 1959), often known in popular culture as Mr. DeMille, was an American filmmaker and actor.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: They... Cecil de Mille's and oldtimers William...I don't know--they would give their actors...put them in the mood.
